input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.2.4
            TITLE: tolerance

            CONTENT:
            rule F.2.4: Tolerance
F.2.4 Tolerance 
Tolerance on dimensions given in the rules is allowed and is addressed in the SES.

final_answer: rule F.2.4: Tolerance F.2.4 Tolerance Tolerance on dimensions given in the rules is allowed and is addressed in the SES.
